input.startup_overview: Research group focused on geospatial AI.

ground_truth.sector: AI, Geospatial Technology, Urban Planning, Agriculture
ground_truth.startup_overview: A research group at Plaksha University developing state-of-the-art geospatial intelligence using computer vision, machine learning, and embedded systems to support urban climate, agriculture, and water security.
ground_truth.problem_statement: Critical information gaps among stakeholders regarding data like urban heat islands and crop health hinder sustainable development and informed decision-making.
ground_truth.solution_summary: Creating scalable models using self-supervised learning to provide actionable insights for urban planning and agriculture, bridging the data gap for industries and government.
ground_truth.target_customers: Industries, startups, insurance companies, and academic collaborators.
ground_truth.business_model: Applied research collaborations and development of geospatial intelligence tools for sustainability goals.
